testcase.name: testAddProduct

error.message: Error adding product: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver

testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Error adding product: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver at com.inventory.dao.ProductDAOImpl.addProduct(ProductDAOImpl.java:35) at com.inventory.service.ProductService.addProduct(ProductService.java:44) at com.inventory.ProductServiceTest.testAddProduct(ProductServiceTest.java:39) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) Caused by: java.sql.SQLFeatureNotSupportedException: not implemented by SQLite JDBC driver at org.sqlite.jdbc3.JDBC3PreparedStatement.unsupported(JDBC3PreparedStatement.java:448) at org.sqlite.jdbc3.JDBC3Statement.getGeneratedKeys(JDBC3Statement.java:357) at com.inventory.dao.ProductDAOImpl.addProduct(ProductDAOImpl.java:30) ... 5 more

testcase.name: testSearchProducts

failure.message: Search should return results for 'Updated' ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Search should return results for 'Updated' ==> expected: <false> but was: <true> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.failNotFalse(AssertFalse.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.assertFalse(AssertFalse.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse(Assertions.java:235) at com.inventory.ProductServiceTest.testSearchProducts(ProductServiceTest.java:110) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
